title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Flat editorial technical infographic on deep navy background with warm terracotta and gold accents and subtle paper texture, divided into two zones. Left zone 'QUALITY GOVERNANCE': three modules — 'cost_tracker' with arrows 'estimate -> reserve -> reconcile', 'slideshow_risk' detector with warning triangle, 'delivery_promise' validator with checkmark; below a slider with modes 'observe / warn / cap'. Right zone 'COMPOSITION + VOLCANO ENGINE': top row composition runtimes 'Remotion (React)', 'HyperFrames (HTML/CSS/GSAP)', 'FFmpeg'; bottom row Volcano Engine tools 'Doubao TTS', 'Seedance', 'Seedream', 'BigMusic', 'ASR' with small auth badges 'Ark Bearer', 'X-Api-Key', 'HMAC V4'. Clean vector shapes, readable labels, no extra text, no UI controls.
